scripts.predev: npm run build -w @xeno/shared && npm run build -w @xeno/database
scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api,simulator -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev -w @xeno/web" "npm run dev -w @xeno/api" "npm run dev -w @xeno/channel-simulator"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @xeno/shared && npm run build -w @xeno/database && npm run build -w @xeno/api && npm run build -w @xeno/channel-simulator && npm run build -w @xeno/web
